steps.title: Find the contrast between the two years
steps.content: The passage contrasts 2005, when LaMontagne performed “more than thirty live sets,” with 2004, when “he'd performed fewer than a dozen times.” This numerical contrast is the defining signal.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the transition word
steps.content:
”On the other hand” works because it signals opposition—in 2005 he performed 30+ times, but on the other hand, in 2004 fewer than a dozen.

The other three don't signal contrast; “additionally” suggests addition, “similarly” implies likeness, and “often” isn't a transition word.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
